allow: Bash(docker compose ps 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations companies 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations companies 2>&1 && docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations proyectos 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python manage.py migrate 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python manage.py check 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec backend python manage.py test apps.proyectos --verbosity=2 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend ng build --configuration=development 2>&1 | tail -30)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend cat node_modules/primeng/package.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(p.get\('version','?'\)\); exports=p.get\('exports',{}\); [print\(k\) for k in list\(exports.keys\(\)\)[:40]]" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend python3 -c "import json; p=json.load\(open\('node_modules/primeng/package.json'\)\); [print\(k\) for k in p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['select','table','tag','textarea','toast','tab']\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/primeng/package.json'\); Object.keys\(p.exports\).filter\(k=>['select','table','tag','textarea','toast','tab','inputtext','inputnumber','progress'].some\(x=>k.includes\(x\)\)\).forEach\(k=>console.log\(k\)\)" 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/primeng/package.json'\); Object.keys\(p.exports\).forEach\(k=>console.log\(k\)\)" 2>&1 | grep -v types)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const m=require\('./node_modules/primeng/select/index'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\)" 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend ls node_modules/primeng/fesm2022/ | grep -E "select|tabs|tab" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/primeng/fesm2022/primeng-select.mjs','utf8'\); const match=t.match\(/export\\s*\\{[^}]+\\}/g\); match && match.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.substring\(0,200\)\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/primeng/fesm2022/primeng-tabs.mjs','utf8'\); const match=t.match\(/export\\s*\\{[^}]+\\}/g\); match && match.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.substring\(0,200\)\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec frontend node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); ['confirmdialog','toast','ripple'].forEach\(m=>{try{const t=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/primeng/fesm2022/primeng-'+m+'.mjs','utf8'\); const match=t.match\(/export\\s*\\{[^}]+\\}/g\); if\(match\) console.log\(m+':', match[0].substring\(0,150\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(m+': NOT FOUND'\)}}\)" 2>&1)
